title: tanacetum argenteum subsp. canum
intro: Tanacetum argenteum subsp. canum, also known as Silver Tansy, is a subspecies of the Tanacetum argenteum plant, a perennial herb in the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to repel insects and its antiseptic and antifungal properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving symptoms of colds and flu, and supporting the immune system. Tanacetum argenteum subsp. canum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
